assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddOidcStateDataFormatterCache with the 'corporate-idp' scheme to use server-side state storage
assertions.rationale: AddOidcStateDataFormatterCache is a Duende-specific extension method not in general ASP.NET Core knowledge.

assertions.assertion: The external login trigger stores returnUrl in AuthenticationProperties.Items before calling Challenge
assertions.rationale: Storing returnUrl in AuthenticationProperties.Items is a standard ASP.NET Core pattern.

assertions.assertion: The callback handler retrieves returnUrl from result.Properties.Items after authenticating against the external cookie scheme
assertions.rationale: Retrieving from Properties.Items is a standard ASP.NET Core pattern.

assertions.assertion: The returnUrl is validated using Url.IsLocalUrl or _interaction.IsValidReturnUrl before redirecting after the callback
assertions.rationale: While Url.IsLocalUrl is known, specifically mentioning IsValidReturnUrl from IdentityServer is less likely without docs.
